## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `ruff check server scripts`
- [ ] UI/API impact reviewed

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and explained.
- [ ] User-facing behavior, API contracts, or generated data changes are covered by tests or documented in this PR.
- [ ] Security, privacy, credentials, and public-data handling impacts were reviewed.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior, setup, data sources, or licensing expectations changed.
- [ ] Contributions comply with `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `SECURITY.md`, `LICENSE`, and `CLA.md`.
